description_long: This lamp consists of two identical, large spherical globes mounted atop tall, angular black pedestals. The globes are smooth and white, likely made of frosted glass or acrylic, designed to diffuse light evenly. The pedestals are geometric and taper upward, providing a modern, minimalist aesthetic. The lamp is quite tall, standing significantly above an average adult, making it suitable for outdoor or large public spaces. The design is symmetrical, with the two globes positioned side by side, suggesting a paired installation. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing a clean, contemporary look.
description: A pair of tall, modern lamps with large white spherical globes on black angular pedestals, designed for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both spherical globes side by side atop their black pedestals, with a person for scale.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth and alignment of the two globes, with the pedestals partially overlapping.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetry and clean lines of the lamp pair.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the globes aligned and the angular shape of the pedestals.
